feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP
feed.subtitle: SAP ERP Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Transaction VA03 - Additional data B tab
entry.content:
Hi All,

I got an incident, open va02 -> give sales order num-> enter-> select an item and click it -> click on additional data b tab-> in rejection reason information change the reason to review rejection to override rejection -> go to next line item using the arrow navigation 
Here while going to next line item it is taking 2minutes to go. 
Can anyone help me to know the reason and what can i do improve the performance technically,it would be a great help

entry.title: Cost Calculation Information Error message while creating or releasing production order
entry.content:
Cost Calculation Information Error message while creating or releasing production order

Please refer attached document for further details

entry.title: Shipment Classification accessible via menu path from VT03N
entry.content: When we activated Customer Classification, the menu path allows to access this classification immediately through the menu path from within tx XD02/XD03 (Extras --> Classification). For Shipment Classification, this menu piece is missing (from tx VT02N/VT03N) and so users need to go into CL20N manually. Could this also be activated for shipment classification (in our case Z90; not the standard code).

entry.title: How SAP SD Connects with Finance During Billing
entry.content:
In organizations running SAP solutions, billing is more than generating an invoice — it is the moment when a sales transaction officially becomes a financial transaction. When a billing document is created in Sales and Distribution (SD), the system automatically records the financial impact in Finance (FI), ensuring accuracy, transparency, and real-time reporting.

Overview of SD–Finance Integration

When a billing document is created, SAP automatically generates a corresponding accounting document in Finance. This document records:

  • Customer receivable
  • Revenue earned
  • Taxes (if applicable)
  • Discounts or surcharges
  • Financial posting linked to the sales process

Business impact:

Sales activities directly update financial statements in real time.

Process Flow: From Billing to Financial Posting

  1. Billing Document Creation

Billing is typically created with reference to:

  • Delivery document
  • Sales order
  • Credit or debit memo request

During billing, the system determines all pricing components such as base price, discounts, taxes, and additional charges.

These values form the basis of the financial posting.

 

 

  1. Automatic Account Determination

SAP determines which general ledger accounts should be posted based on configured rules. The system evaluates:

  • Sales organization
  • Customer account assignment group
  • Material account assignment group
  • Pricing condition type

Using this information, SAP identifies:

  • Revenue account
  • Customer receivable account
  • Tax account
  1. Creation of the Accounting Document

Once the billing document is saved, the system posts an accounting entry in Finance.

Typical posting:

Debit: Customer (Accounts Receivable)

Credit: Revenue Account

Credit: Tax Payable (if applicable)

  1. Document Flow and Traceability

SAP maintains a complete document chain linking:

Sales Order → Delivery → Billing → Accounting Document

Business Benefits of SD–FI Integration

  • Real-time financial visibility
  • Reduced manual work
  • Faster period closing
  • Strong audit trail
  • Cross-functional alignment

Example Scenario

A company bills a customer for goods worth $1,000 plus $100 tax.

System posting:

Debit Customer: $1,100

Credit Revenue: $1,000

Credit Tax Payable: $100

Best Practices

  • Maintain accurate master data
  • Validate pricing and account determination regularly
  • Align SD and Finance teams
  • Monitor posting errors
  • Test billing scenarios during system changes

Conclusion

Billing in SAP SD serves as the bridge between sales operations and financial accounting. Through automatic integration with Finance, every completed sale is immediately reflected in financial records with accuracy and traceability.

entry.title: Not able to close Production Order
entry.content:
Hello Team, 

While execution CO02 to close production order getti ng error, please check attachement and provide solution.

entry.title: Asset Report not executed in ECC
entry.content: When running the asset reports in the system, an error message appears stating ‘Fiscal year change has not yet been made for company code XXX,’ even though the fiscal year is open for the asset period in OAAQ (1+2). The detailed screenshots are attached herewith for your reference. Kindly advise on how this issue can be resolved.

entry.title: Address does not exist error while checking delivery address of PO
entry.content:
Hi,
Hope you are doing well!

When we tried to open delivery address tab for a PO, we are getting error as "Address doesn't exist (address number)  (PO number) 00010 "
The current address number is different and the previous address was deleted.
Kindly let us know how to fix this error. User unable to change the address number even through ME22N transaction code.


Thanks,
Naga Chaitanya V
vnagachaitanya@deloitte.com

entry.title: update open delivery quantity even if a delivery block is set
entry.content:
Hi,

The business is asking to update open credit values even if a delivery block was set on schedule line of a sales order.

OSS note "741980 - Open credit values with delivery block in the sales order " does not meet business requierments. 

How can I change this standard behavior?

entry.title: Sub contracting
entry.content:
Hello team

My scenario given below 

FG product has 4 operations. First two operations are externally processed and third and last operation are produced internally.

By consuming a raw material first operation has been processed and completed. This is the input for second operation and processed externally. Third and fourth steps are processed internally. Also please note that my client wants to view the stock at all stages with batch number. Can you pour some ideas regarding mapping this scenario.

Thank you in advance 

Venkat

entry.title: Unable to Reverse Bill of Exchange Special G/L Document in F 20 – Error F5345
entry.content:
We are facing an issue while reversing a Bill of Exchange Special G/L transaction using T‑code F‑20. When we enter the correct Key Date (same as the due date), the system returns the following error:

Error Message: No due item exists at the key date (Message no. F5345)

Issue Details:

  • Transaction Type: Bill of Exchange – Special G/L
  • Reversal T‑code: F‑20
  • Key Date entered: Correct due date
  • System still shows error F5345
  • Other Special G/L transactions are reversing successfully
  • OB86 period is maintained as Period 5
  • Please find the attached error details document

entry.title: From where the payment method is getting fetched in sales order line item?
entry.content: I need to understand from where the payment method is getting fetched in sales order line item, as customer master data is having 'blank' payment method but still somehow in sales order line-item payment method 'direct debit' is getting picked automatically. I need to know which configuration is bringing this. because of this the invoice is getting created with 'direct debit' payment method & payment is also happening with 'direct debit' method, which doesn't need. Hence, I need to rectify the config and correct asap.

entry.title: Excel Reporting
entry.content:
Hello professionals!

If you could have one pre-built Excel dashboard automatically populated from any SAP report, which report would you choose?

What do you wish that report could tell you automatically?

entry.title: Anlagengitter mit einzeiliger Darstellung notwendig
entry.content:
Es fehlt die Funtkon, das Anlagengitter S_ALR_87011990 einzeilig darzustellen.

Die Gitterversion bietet nicht so viele Spalten.

entry.title: MRP indicator (1 or 2) for more than 1 scheduling agreement for same material & vendor combination
entry.content:
it is possible set MRP relevance indicator(1 or 2) for more than 1 scheduling agreement for same material and vendor combination.

Also want to know,if MRP area can be used to meet requirements. 

We have been looking for a solution for the last 1 month .

entry.title: New Components adding in existing BOM
entry.content:
We have approximately 500 BOMs, and the component sequences are not consistent across these BOMs. We need to add one new component to all BOMs in mass.

Could please provide a solution.

entry.title: Wrong Volume Calculation in Delivery
entry.content: Wrong Volume is getting calculated in Delivery Header in SAP. It is getting calculated correctly at item level. Packing also happening in this case. What could be the reason for wrong Volume Calculation at header level? This is happening only for 1 material and the stacking factor is changed from 1 to 3 in recent changes. Is that the reason? Or Do I need to check any config related to packing? Please advise.

entry.title: Decimals are not not displayed in WBS element field in standard report
entry.content: Decimals are not not displayed in WBS element field in standard report

entry.title: Error in MD03 MRP run "in house production time is high" error
entry.content:
in MD03 i am getting in house production time is high error. this i due to configuration of Work scheduling view. when processing time is greater then base quantity that time i get this error, but for other material even if processing time is high then base quantity we don't get error. so what can be the reason for getting this error what configuration setting i should check.

 

  • Material – 0022840001 and plant 1173

     

  • Case 1 =Material = 021475-000 and plant 1306
  • Case 2=Material =0022840001 and plant 1173

  • Issue= for case 2 material we are getting in house production time is high error in MD03

  •  



  • Case 2= if we put processing time high then base quantity in work scheduling view then we get in house production time error in MD03
  • Case 1= if we put processing time high then base quantity in work scheduling view then  also we don’t  get in house production time error in MD03


Requirement= we want to know what parameter should be check to identify what is causing erroring case 2

entry.title: Selection fields in the SAP query are not displayed
entry.content:
Hello OSS Team,

When creating a new query from a copy of a standard query, not all selection fields are displayed, even though they are copied from the original query.

We checked support notes 2101098, 2362425, and 2554642. These are no longer relevant, as our C11 system is already on SP 28. Support note 2601579 also did not provide a solution.

Thanks for the support

With kind regards

Josef Walter

entry.title: FOREIGN TRADE DATA: Function code cannot be selected
entry.content:
Hello,

Good day!

We encountered an error in the Foreign Trade Data item. When navigating through each description in the Incompleteness Analysis, we received the error “Function code cannot be selected” and the fields were disabled. 

Could you please assist with the possible solution?

Please check the attached screenshot for reference.

Thank you!
